title: cantharospermum molle
intro: Cantharospermum molle, also known as velvet leaf, is a plant species native to tropical regions, characterized by its soft, velvety leaves and small, white flowers. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cantharospermum molle include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Cantharospermum molle are often made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
